2606.26710.title: Kalman Prototypical Networks for Few-shot Fault Detection in Combined Cycle Gas Turbines
2606.26710.paper_summary: Combined-cycle gas turbines (CCGTs) play a key role in modern power generation, offering both high efficiency and reduced environmental impact. However, their complex thermo-fluid and mechanical interactions complicate fault detection, particularly when labeled fault data are scarce. In this paper, we introduce the Kalman Prototypical Network (KPN), a metric-based few-shot learning (FSL) framework specifically tailored for CCGT fault diagnosis. We model the evolution of class prototypes as latent stochastic states in a dynamic system to reduce episodic variance and improve robustness in embedding representation. Synthetic data sets generated with a high-fidelity Modelica-based dynamic simulation of an offshore CCGT system were used, simulating both normal operation and progressive leak faults under transient conditions. Application of the proposed framework on simulated leak fault detection tasks demonstrate that KPN outperforms conventional FSL methods such as Matching Networks, Relation Networks, and MAML in both accuracy and stability under varying support and query configurations. The proposed framework significantly improves training convergence and generalization by stabilizing class representations, making it well-suited for real-world CCGT fault detection where labeled data is limited.
2606.26710.paper_summary_zh: 結合循環燃氣渦輪（CCGT）在現代發電中扮演著關鍵角色，提供高效率和降低環境影響。然而，它們複雜的熱流體和機械互動使故障檢測變得困難，尤其是在標記的故障數據稀缺的情況下。在本文中，我們介紹了卡爾曼原型網絡（KPN），這是一個基於度量的少樣本學習（FSL）框架，專門針對CCGT故障診斷。我們將類別原型的演變建模為動態系統中的潛在隨機狀態，以減少情節方差並提高嵌入表示的穩健性。使用基於高保真度Modelica的離岸CCGT系統動態模擬生成的合成數據集，模擬了正常運行和在瞬態條件下的逐步洩漏故障。對模擬洩漏故障檢測任務應用所提出的框架表明，KPN在準確性和穩定性方面均優於傳統的FSL方法，如匹配網絡、關係網絡和MAML，尤其是在支持和查詢配置變化的情況下。所提出的框架通過穩定類別表示顯著提高了訓練收斂和泛化能力，使其非常適合於標記數據有限的現實世界CCGT故障檢測。
2606.26710.author: Mohammed Ayalew Belay et.al.
2606.26710.authors: Mohammed Ayalew Belay, Lucas Ferreira Bernardino, Adil Rasheed, Rubén M. Montañés, Pierluigi Salvo Rossi
